title: Scroll of Silence negate Lightning card effect and send to cemetery

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand if your opponent plays a Lightning card. Negate the Lightning card effect and send it to the cemetery. This card cannot be negated.

effect.value: Negate effect and send to cemetery
